text: Hearing those words repeated triggers curiosity and faint suspicion. I scrutinize the intent: is it assurance, or an attempt to persuade? Entering this space, surrounded by research and development displays, I feel compelled to ask what undercurrents lie beneath repeated affirmations. There is a tension between trust and inquiry in this environment full of intellect and innovation. My thoughts spiral—how often must goodness be named before it is believed?
